title: Procurement
description: The catalogue, the suppliers, and the buying list built from them.

steps.title: Procurement home
steps.voiceScript: Procurement brings together the catalogue, the suppliers and your buying list.
steps.captionText: Procurement brings together the catalogue, the suppliers and your buying list.
steps.fallbackMessage: Procurement home: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Product Catalogue
steps.description: Every product available to price a job.
steps.voiceScript: The product catalogue lists everything available to price a job.
steps.captionText: The product catalogue lists everything available to price a job.
steps.fallbackMessage: Product Catalogue: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Browse the catalogue
steps.voiceScript: Filter by category and specification to find the part you need.
steps.captionText: Filter by category and specification to find the part you need.
steps.fallbackMessage: Browse the catalogue: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Suppliers
steps.description: Who supplies each product, and how to reach them.
steps.voiceScript: The supplier register shows who supplies each product.
steps.captionText: The supplier register shows who supplies each product.
steps.fallbackMessage: Suppliers: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Supplier register
steps.description: Contact details travel into the price sheet.
steps.voiceScript: These contact details travel straight into your price sheet.
steps.captionText: These contact details travel straight into your price sheet.
steps.fallbackMessage: Supplier register: not visible on this screen yet.
